titleEn: Niqo Robotics Takes India-Built Physical AI Farming Platform to Europe at Bharat Innovates 2026
titleZh: Niqo Robotics携印度造物理AI农业平台亮相Bharat Innovates 2026，进军欧洲市场
summaryZh: 印度物理AI公司Niqo Robotics被选为代表印度参加Bharat Innovates 2026深科技峰会，成为120家创新企业中唯一的精准AI农业机器人公司。其物理AI除草平台已在印度农田验证，无需订阅、无隐藏成本，从第一天起为农民带来投资回报。公司计划以法国为欧洲切入点，拓展全球市场，标志着印度造农业机器人从本土走向全球的重要一步。
featuredReason: 该新闻展示了物理AI在精准农业（尤其是除草）中的商业化落地，对智慧畜牧行业（特别是种植业与养殖业结合的农场）具有技术借鉴和模式参考价值，值得关注印度造农业机器人的全球化路径。
contentFull: By Niqo Robotics Share Handpicked among 120 innovators for the Government of India’s flagship deep-tech conclave, Niqo signals how Made-in-India farm robotics is moving from Indian fields to global markets. Photo: Niqo Niqo Robotics, a Physical AI company building intelligent agricultural robots for global farms, has been selected to represent India at Bharat Innovates 2026, the Government of India’s flagship innovation conclave. Taking place in Nice from 14 to 16 June, the conclave brings together 120 deep-tech innovators screened from more than 2,000 applicants, spotlighting India-built technologies with the potential to scale globally. The event was inaugurated by the Hon’ble Prime Minister of India, Shri Narendra Modi, and the President of France, Emmanuel Macron. Niqo joins the cohort as the only precision-AI farm robotics company on the delegation, marking a significant moment for India’s deep-tech ecosystem and the global rise of India-built agricultural robotics. Its selection reflects the core vision of Bharat Innovates: to take India-incubated, Made-in-India deep-tech companies to global markets and show how they can solve some of the world’s most urgent productivity, sustainability and labor challenges. “Being selected to represent India at Bharat Innovates, and to do so as the only precision-AI farm robotics company among 120 deep-tech innovators, is a proud moment for the team,” said Jaisimha Rao, Founder and CEO of Niqo Robotics. “But our story is ultimately a global one. We built Niqo to prove that Physical AI can be a real business. We’re arriving in Europe with a platform that already pays for itself for the farmer: no subscriptions, no hidden costs, just a machine that delivers ROI from day one. “Platforms like Bharat Innovates are important because they give Indian deep-tech companies a credible bridge into global markets. For us, it is a chance to show that India can build Physical AI products that are technically advanced, commercially ready and relevant for farmers anywhere in the world. We are looking to bring on the right strategic investors and partners who can help us scale this model across Europe, Australia and other global agricultural markets.” MORE BY NIQO ROBOTICS Market Watch May 25, 2026 Niqo Robotics Charts Path to Profitability as Physical AI Weeding Platform Expands into New Crops, Markets, and New Generation of Products By Niqo Robotics|May 25, 2026 Top Articles Read More Read More Read More Read More Read More UC Riverside Develops Modern-Day Robotic Divining Rod For Niqo, France is a particularly relevant starting point because of its strong agricultural base, deep farming heritage and central role in Europe’s agritech ecosystem. As one of Europe’s most important agricultural markets, it offers a meaningful entry point for technologies that can help farms improve productivity, reduce input intensity and transition towards more sustainable models. Built in India for global agriculture, Niqo’s platform reflects how Indian deep-tech is moving from lab-led innovation to commercially deployed products capable of competing in demanding international markets. The company’s intelligent weeding systems are already commercially deployed in the United States and India, with Europe and Australia emerging as the next priority markets for its Physical AI farming platform. At a time when many global farm robotics players continue to prioritize scale over sustainable economics, Niqo is charting a different path, one built on capital efficiency, farmer ROI and commercially viable deployment from the outset. Niqo is demonstrating that farm robotics can move beyond long development cycles and high-burn deployment models to deliver measurable farmer ROI from the outset. Bharat Innovates opens doors for India-built deep-tech Niqo’s presence at Bharat Innovates in Nice marks the company’s formal entry into the European conversation, where rising labor costs, tightening restrictions on chemical herbicides and pressure to improve sustainability are driving demand for precision automation. France also offers a strong testbed for the next generation of farm automation, with a farming ecosystem that is both deeply rooted in tradition and increasingly focused on precision, sustainability and productivity. Bharat Innovates gives Niqo more than global visibility. It creates a practical market-access platform at a critical stage of the company’s expansion, bringing Indian deep-tech startups into direct conversations with European investors, chambers of commerce, policy stakeholders and ecosystem partners. Alongside India’s broader push to strengthen deep-tech through funding support, ecosystem building and global market access, platforms such as Bharat Innovates are helping companies like Niqo move from India-built innovation to global commercial scale. Approaching profitability: a rare path in farm robotics As farm robotics companies worldwide work to translate innovation into commercially viable businesses, Niqo’s core AI-enabled weeding business is now approaching self-sustainability, a milestone few in the category have reached. The company attributes this to growing commercial traction, repeat demand and a model built around disciplined economics rather than scale at any cost. Niqo’s farmer-first model is built around a one-time purchase with no recurring subscription fees, backed by 24/7 service support and locally stocked spare parts, allowing growers to adopt advanced automation without the burden of hidden or ongoing platform charges. An intelligent farming platform, not just a single machine At the core of Niqo’s next phase of growth is Niqo Sense, the company’s proprietary AI camera platform that can be integrated across multiple machine form factors and retrofitted onto existing farm equipment. The platform combines AI at the edge with a dual-tank, twin-nozzle architecture to perform weeding, thinning and beneficial spraying in a single pass, reducing the need for multiple machines and repeated field operations. The system processes thousands of plant-level decisions per second in real time, entirely on the edge and with zero cloud dependency, delivering more than 99% accuracy even in dense and challenging field conditions. This tight integration of intelligent software with purpose-built hardware places Niqo at the forefront of a category attracting increasing investor and customer attention globally. India’s next farming leap: Physical AI robots Niqo’s growth reflects a larger shift in Indian agriculture and Indian deep-tech. After the Green Revolution and the era of tractorization, Indian agriculture is now ready for its next leap: intelligent, AI-enabled farming systems that can improve productivity, reduce input intensity and help farmers respond to labor and sustainability pressures. Niqo is poised to lead this farm robotics revolution as a Made-in-India startup building for both Indian and global farms. Designed in India and deployed across demanding agricultural environments internationally, Niqo’s field robots show how Indian engineering can move beyond domestic problem-solving to shape global categories such as farm robotics and Physical AI. Its systems help growers reduce input costs, improve precision, lower chemical usage and maintain soil health. For Niqo, the India opportunity remains central. The company is bullish on India’s readiness for Physical AI in agriculture, while the Government of India’s support for Made-in-India deep-tech startups is creating a stronger ecosystem for companies building frontier technologies. This convergence marks an inflection point: India-built innovations are no longer only solving for India, they are increasingly ready to change how the world farms. The company plans to build on this foundation by expanding into new crops, new applications and new geographies through its broader Physical AI platform. 0 1 5 Niqo Robotics Takes India-Built Physical AI Farming Platform to Europe at Bharat Innovates 2026 Subscribe Today For Subscribe Niqo Robotics is a Physical AI company building intelligent agricultural robots for sustainable farming worldwide. Founded by Jaisimha Rao, a Carnegie Mellon-trained engineer and former BlackRock professional, Niqo develops AI-powered weeding, thinning, and precision spraying systems that help growers reduce costs, cut chemical usage, and overcome labor challenges. See all author stories here. Topics: featured-home
translationZh:
Niqo Robotics，一家为全球农场构建智能农业机器人的物理AI公司，已被选中代表印度参加Bharat Innovates 2026——印度政府的旗舰创新峰会。该峰会于6月14日至16日在尼斯举行，汇聚了从2000多名申请者中筛选出的120家深科技创新企业，聚焦具有全球规模化潜力的印度造技术。峰会由印度总理纳伦德拉·莫迪和法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙共同揭幕。

Niqo作为代表团中唯一的精准AI农业机器人公司加入，标志着印度深科技生态系统以及印度造农业机器人全球崛起的重要时刻。其入选反映了Bharat Innovates的核心愿景：将印度孵化、印度制造的深科技公司推向全球市场，展示它们如何解决世界上最紧迫的生产力、可持续性和劳动力挑战。

“被选中代表印度参加Bharat Innovates，并且作为120家深科技创新企业中唯一的精准AI农业机器人公司，这对团队来说是骄傲的时刻，”Niqo Robotics创始人兼CEO Jaisimha Rao表示。“但我们的故事归根结底是全球性的。我们打造Niqo是为了证明物理AI可以成为真正的业务。我们带着一个已经为农民带来回报的平台来到欧洲：没有订阅费，没有隐藏成本，只有一台从第一天起就能带来投资回报的机器。

“像Bharat Innovates这样的平台很重要，因为它们为印度深科技公司提供了进入全球市场的可信桥梁。对我们来说，这是一个展示印度能够构建技术上先进、商业上成熟且对全球任何地方农民都适用的物理AI产品的机会。我们正在寻找合适的战略投资者和合作伙伴，帮助我们把这个模式扩展到欧洲、澳大利亚和其他全球农业市场。”

对于Niqo来说，法国是一个特别相关的起点，因为它拥有强大的农业基础、深厚的农业传统以及在欧洲农业科技生态系统中的核心地位。作为欧洲最重要的农业市场之一，法国为能够帮助农场提高生产力、减少投入强度并转向更可持续模式的技术提供了有意义的切入点。

Niqo的平台在印度为全球农业而建，其设计反映了

由 Niqo Robotics 分享。在印度政府旗舰级深度科技盛会中，从120家创新企业中精选而出的Niqo，标志着印度制造的农业机器人正从印度农田走向全球市场。图片来源：Niqo。Niqo Robotics是一家为全球农场构建智能农业机器人的实体人工智能公司，已入选代表印度参加2026年6月14日至16日在尼斯举行的印度政府旗舰创新盛会“Bharat Innovates 2026”。此次盛会汇集了从2000多名申请者中筛选出的120家深度科技初创企业，聚焦具有全球规模化潜力的印度本土技术。该活动由印度总理纳伦德拉·莫迪阁下和法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙共同揭幕。Niqo作为代表团中唯一的精准AI农业机器人公司入选，这标志着印度深度科技生态系统以及印度制造的农业机器人全球崛起的重要时刻。其入选反映了“Bharat Innovates”的核心愿景：将印度孵化、印度制造的深度科技公司推向全球市场，并展示它们如何解决世界上一些最紧迫的生产力、可持续性和劳动力挑战。

“被选为代表印度参加Bharat Innovates，并且是120家深度科技创新企业中唯一的精准AI农业机器人公司，这对团队来说是一个自豪的时刻，”Niqo Robotics创始人兼首席执行官Jaisimha Rao表示。“但我们的故事最终是全球性的。我们创建Niqo是为了证明实体人工智能可以成为一门真正的生意。我们带着一个已经能为农民带来回报的平台进入欧洲：没有订阅费，没有隐藏成本，只有一台从第一天起就能产生投资回报的机器。”

“像Bharat Innovates这样的平台很重要，因为它们为印度深度科技公司提供了一座通往全球市场的可信桥梁。对我们来说，这是一个展示印度能够构建技术先进、商业成熟且适用于世界各地农民的实体人工智能产品的机会。我们期待找到合适的战略投资者和合作伙伴，帮助我们在这个模式扩展到欧洲、澳大利亚和其他全球农业市场。”

更多来自Niqo Robotics的内容：市场观察，2026年5月25日。Niqo Robotics规划盈利路径，实体人工智能除草平台扩展至新作物、新市场和新一代产品。作者：Niqo Robotics | 2026年5月25日。热门文章：阅读更多、阅读更多、阅读更多、阅读更多、阅读更多。加州大学河滨分校为Niqo开发现代机器人探水棒。

对于Niqo而言，法国是一个尤为相关的起点，因为它拥有强大的农业基础、深厚的农耕传统以及在欧洲农业科技生态系统中的核心地位。作为欧洲最重要的农业市场之一，它为能够帮助农场提高生产力、减少投入强度并转向更可持续模式的技术提供了一个有意义的切入点。

Niqo的平台在印度为全球农业而建，反映了印度深度科技如何从实验室主导的创新转向能够在苛刻的国际市场上竞争的商业化部署产品。该公司的智能除草系统已在美国和印度实现商业部署，而欧洲和澳大利亚正成为其实体人工智能农业平台的下一批优先市场。

在全球许多农业机器人公司继续优先考虑规模而非可持续经济模式之际，Niqo正开辟一条不同的道路——一条建立在资本效率、农民投资回报率以及从一开始就实现商业可行部署基础上的道路。Niqo正在证明，农业机器人可以超越漫长的开发周期和高消耗的部署模式，从一开始就为农民带来可衡量的投资回报。

**Bharat Innovates为印度制造的深度科技打开大门**

Niqo在尼斯Bharat Innovates上的亮相标志着该公司正式进入欧洲的讨论圈。在欧洲，不断上涨的劳动力成本、对化学除草剂日益严格的限制以及提高可持续性的压力，正在推动对精准自动化的需求。法国也为下一代农业自动化提供了一个强大的试验场，其农业生态系统既深深植根于传统，又日益注重精准、可持续性和生产力。

Bharat Innovates为Niqo带来的不仅仅是全球知名度。它在公司扩张的关键阶段创造了一个实用的市场准入平台，将印度深度科技初创企业直接与欧洲投资者、商会、政策利益相关者和生态系统合作伙伴联系起来。在印度通过资金支持、生态系统建设和全球市场准入来加强深度科技的更广泛努力中，像Bharat Innovates这样的平台正在帮助像Niqo这样的公司从印度制造的创新走向全球商业规模。

**接近盈利：农业机器人领域的罕见路径**

在全球农业机器人公司努力将创新转化为商业可行业务的同时，Niqo基于AI的核心除草业务正接近自给自足，这是该领域很少有公司达到的里程碑。该公司将此归功于日益增长的商业吸引力、重复需求以及一个围绕严谨经济模式而非不计代价追求规模而构建的模型。

Niqo以农民为先的模式围绕一次性购买构建，没有经常性订阅费，并辅以全天候服务支持和本地备件库存，使种植者能够采用先进的自动化技术，而无需承担隐藏或持续的平台费用。

**一个智能农业平台，而非仅仅一台机器**

Niqo下一阶段增长的核心是Niqo Sense，该公司的专有AI摄像头平台，可集成到多种机器形态中，并可加装到现有农业设备上。该平台将边缘AI与双罐、双喷嘴架构相结合，能够在一次作业中完成除草、间苗和有益喷洒，从而减少对多种农药的需求。
author: Matt Hopkins
contentHtml:
Handpicked among 120 innovators for the Government of India’s flagship deep-tech conclave, Niqo signals how Made-in-India farm robotics is moving from Indian fields to global markets.
The post Niqo Robotics Takes India-Built Physical AI Farming Platform to Europe at Bharat Innovates 2026 appeared first on Global Ag Tech Initiative.
